supplier_notes: This is a supplier declaration of preferential origin (Lieferantenerklärung) for rolled iron and steel products with EU preferential origin (Belgium).
No cumulation applied.
Document covers order positions 1-5 with dimensions 1.5mm thickness in widths 1052mm, 1062mm, 1095mm, 1155mm, and 1215mm.
Grade: S355MC, pickled and oiled (gebeizt + geölt). Customs tariff number: 72082700.
Delivery is subject to correct and timely self-supply; liability for non-delivery or delivery delays is excluded.

Force majeure events (e.g. operational disruptions, fire, machine/roll breakage, raw material or energy shortages) entitle the supplier to postpone deliveries for the duration of the impediment plus a reasonable start-up period.
No mill certificate (kein Werkszeugnis) provided.
Weighing method: Brutto für Netto (gross for net).
Labelling: EMW standard, without logo.
Loading orientation: standing in cradle with upright support (stehend in Mulde + Steher hoch).

supplier_notes: Material is IIA (second choice) grade; delivered with exclusion of any warranty.
Downgrading reasons: various surface defects and quality deviations.
For declassified material, specifications for grade, zinc coating, surface finish, and surface protection are non-binding and serve as guidance only.
Supplier accepts no liability for intended use or consequential costs.
Inspection of the material's external condition by visit or photos is generally possible before delivery.
A chemical and mechanical analysis must be performed before the material enters any processing operation.
Processed/worked material cannot be subject to complaints/claims.
No claim for replacement if material availability cannot be guaranteed.
Confirmation is subject to the supplier's own receipt of the goods.
Goods remain supplier's property until full payment, even in processed state.
Late payment will incur default interest charges.
Material will be invoiced 14 days after notification of readiness.
Storage costs of 0.80 EUR/MT per commenced week will be charged 14 days after notification of readiness.
No liability under §434 BGB Abs. 3 for ordinary use or customary condition; special agreements required for specific uses.
Although material is sold as dry, a light grease film due to production process cannot be excluded.
